examples: An immense volume of rocks and molten lava was erupted.
The volcano spewed a fountain of molten rock 650 feet in the air.
A nearby volcano erupted violently, sending out a hail of molten rock and boiling mud.
On Earth, sea-floor spreading is fuelled by molten rock upwelling from deep inside the Earth.
Will molten fire rain from the sky or will the Web service stop working?
